title: SRL Diagnostics is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: SRL Diagnostics is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? SRL Diagnostics in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SRL Diagnostics:
SRL Diagnostics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
